problem_description: Memory leak of stripe_uptodate_bitmap in btrfs_raid_bio due to missing deallocation.
NULL pointer dereference when writing to dmem.max without specifying a limit value
The command workqueue is destroyed before unregistering from rfkill, leading to a race where nci_close_device accesses the freed workqueue.
The SendReceive() function fails to free the response buffer when cifs_send_recv() returns an error.
suspicious RCU usage warning in dmem_cgroup_unregister_region() due to use of list_for_each_rcu() without RCU read lock
Potential buffer overflow in skb fragments array in t7xx_dpmaif_set_frag_to_skb() due to missing check for MAX_SKB_FRAGS.
batch_clear() does not initialize the 'kind' field of struct pfn_batch, leading to a KMSAN warning about an uninitialized value read in batch_add_pfn_num().
A deadlock can occur if fprop_new_period is interrupted by a hardirq that attempts to read the same sequence counter.
The sg_list and sge parameters were swapped in the call to nvme_free_sgls(), causing incorrect DMA unmapping and potential data corruption.
Memory is leaked because the response buffer from a failed SMB2_open call is not freed before retrying the operation.
